enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song is a playful invitation to enjoy life and take a break, featuring fun lyrics about coffee and long drives.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Kandhasamy, this song showcases the light-hearted and romantic moments between the lead characters, emphasizing their chemistry.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features vocals by Vikram, Suchitra, and Malathy.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

When was this song released?

This song was released on May 23, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Excuse Me Mr Kanthasamy is a lively and upbeat track that reflects the carefree spirit of youth. It captures the playful banter between the characters as they invite each other for coffee and a drive, symbolizing spontaneity and joy. The energetic beats and catchy lyrics evoke a sense of happiness and celebration, making it perfect for party settings. Overall, the song conveys a light-hearted vibe that resonates with the audience, encouraging them to embrace fun moments.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Excuse Me Mr Kanthasamy from the Kandhasamy movie is a vibrant and catchy track that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With a unique collaboration of Vikram's dynamic vocals alongside Suchitra and Malathy, this song is sure to get you dancing. The infectious beats by Devi Sri Prasad elevate the energy, making it a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Excuse Me
Excuse Meeeeeeeeeee Mr Kandhasamyyyyyyyyy
Hey excuse me Mr Kandhasamy, let's have a coffee. Come with me, hot or cold, you decide.
Hey excuse me Mr Kandhasamy, let's go for a long drive. Come with me, at a slow speed, you check it out.
Oh, the SIM card is empty. Turning you on is a waste. Hutch bulldog is happy, tell me where I should go, I will take care of it.
Hey man, when will you come to the main road? Come on, come on, come on, come on.
popopop
Hey excuse me Mr Kandhasamy, let's have a coffee. Come with me, hot or cold, you decide.
Hey excuse me Ms Subulakshmi, your activities are wrong. Your talk is very annoying, Lakshmi... Go away.
You are my love... you are my love...
Hey Kandhasamy, when the storm came into my life, I looked at your beauty and felt like a man. Because of your beauty, I couldn't hold back, and I won't give you a penny in my hand.

God doesn't exist, says Ramasamy. Love doesn't exist, says Kandhasamy. No, no, no, says Valluvar. Grandpa, those who crossed the fight, in the last words, said we need to put our name. If we fight with you, life will go downhill.
Hitler was born, Hitler was born, love is not a war, don't kill it. Linkan Perane, Linkan Perane, don't talk about the principles, don't kill it. Kashmir, I am not Pakistan, that's the truth.
Come on, come on, come on, come on, come on, come on, come on.
Hey excuse me Mr Kandhasamy, let's have a coffee. Come with me, hot or cold, you decide.
Hey excuse me Ms Subulakshmi, your activities are wrong. Your lips are very annoying, Lakshmi... Go away.
Hey, why are you being so over the top? You can't do anything. Are you the girl who studied? You can't study me. Hey, get lost. Just go away. A little mood is too much... oh no!
I want to do something, I want to do something. If I leave now, it won't be wrong. After that, it will be a mess. Come on, come on, if a lady becomes a fool, girls believe it, boys become fools.

Hey, the salt is too much, the salt is too much. In life, you are just a burden. Hey, the duck is too much, the duck is too much. Even the egg won't be set for you, don't talk. You crack your head, please, don't change the track.
Come on, come on, come on, come on, come on, come on, come on.
Hey excuse me Mr Kandhasamy, let's have a coffee. Come with me, hot or cold, you decide.
Hey excuse me Ms Subulakshmi, your activities are wrong. Your lips are very annoying, Lakshmi... Go away.
